musicDiscovery.name: Music Discovery
musicDiscovery.description: For my class Progressive web apps I was asked to create an app with data from an API with serverside rendering. I decided to create a music discovery app where people can browse metalcore albums.
features: Download the website as progressive web app

capturingCorona.name: Capturing Corona
capturingCorona.description: Together with a two other students from one of my classes, we were asked by in60seconds to create a new corona dashboard for CBS as part of one of our classes. In this project, I took the role of developer while my teammates designed the website and gathered the data
features: Browse the latest news about corona in a pleasurable way
Quickly get insights on the situations you are interested in
compare data easily in layered line charts

frontendApplications.name: Mindervaliede parkeer garages
frontendApplications.description: In order to better understand Vue.js, I made a dashboard about disbled parking places in the netherlands using a RDW dataset. Per province, I show how many of the parking spaces are accessible to disabled people.
features: Compare the amount of disabled parking spaces per province

dinnerSelector.name: Dinner Selector
dinnerSelector.description: Since I always struggle to think of something to eat for dinner, I made a website for it. By clicking the button, a random dish will be selected for dinner
